condition.description: Defines the IAM condition that must be met for the binding to apply, using attributes like expression, title, and description.

members.description: List of identities to which the IAM binding applies; must be in the format `user:<email>`, `serviceAccount:<email>`, or `group:<email>`.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to grant to members, such as 'roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor'; must match predefined or custom roles in Google Cloud.

secret_id.description: ID of the secret in Google Secret Manager to which the IAM binding will be applied.
